variants.title: HiFi Filter SD 40864 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 557
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SD 40864 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 557
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SD 40864 Urea Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB 557. Easy to install and replace, the SD 40864 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: UREA FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 95.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 88.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 56.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 17.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 8.0 mm
